channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3116] (lu_object.c:1140:lu_device_fini()) ASSERTION( cfs_atomic_read(&d->ld_ref) == 0 ) failed: Refcount is 1
item.description:
== sanity test 231b: must not assert on fully utilized OST request buffer ============================ 08:46:34 (1365176794)
sanity test_231b: @@@@@@ FAIL: dd of=/mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d231/f.sanity.231b seek=4 failed
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4019:error_noexit()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4042:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:10989:test_231b()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4281:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4314:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4184:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:10993:main()
Dumping lctl log to /tmp/test_logs/2013-04-05/064048/sanity.test_231b.*.1365176795.log
fat-amd-2: sh: /tmp/test_logs/2013-04-05/064048/sanity.test_231b.debug_log.fat-amd-2.1365176795.log: No such file or directory
fat-amd-2: sh: line 1: /tmp/test_logs/2013-04-05/064048/sanity.test_231b.dmesg.fat-amd-2.1365176795.log: No such file or directory
fat-amd-4: sh: /tmp/test_logs/2013-04-05/064048/sanity.test_231b.debug_log.fat-amd-4.1365176795.log: No such file or directory
fat-amd-4: sh: line 1: /tmp/test_logs/2013-04-05/064048/sanity.test_231b.dmesg.fat-amd-4.1365176795.log: No such file or directory
client-3: Host key verification failed.
client-3: rsync: connection unexpectedly closed (0 bytes received so far) [sender]
client-3: rsync error: unexplained error (code 255) at io.c(605) [sender=3.0.9]
client-1: Host key verification failed.
client-1: rsync: connection unexpectedly closed (0 bytes received so far) [sender]
client-1: rsync error: unexplained error (code 255) at io.c(605) [sender=3.0.9]
fat-amd-2: Host key verification failed.
fat-amd-2: rsync: connection unexpectedly closed (0 bytes received so far) [sender]
fat-amd-2: rsync error: unexplained error (code 255) at io.c(600) [sender=3.0.6]
fat-amd-4: Host key verification failed.
fat-amd-4: rsync: connection unexpectedly closed (0 bytes received so far) [sender]
fat-amd-4: rsync error: unexplained error (code 255) at io.c(600) [sender=3.0.6]
FAIL 231b (2s)

== sanity test 232: failed lock should not block umount ============================================== 08:46:36 (1365176796)
fail_loc=0x31c
1+0 records in
1+0 records out
1048576 bytes (1.0 MB) copied, 0.00650157 s, 161 MB/s
fail_loc=0
10.10.4.133@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre lustre rw,flock,user_xattr 0 0
Stopping client client-1.lab.whamcloud.com /mnt/lustre (opts

Message from syslogd@client-1 at Apr 5 08:46:36 ...
kernel:[38113.066284] LustreError: 13233:0:(lu_object.c:1140:lu_device_fini()) ASSERTION( cfs_atomic_read(&d->ld_ref) == 0 ) failed: Refcount is 1

38113.066284] LustreError: 13233:0:(lu_object.c:1140:lu_device_fini()) ASSERTION( cfs_atomic_read(&d->ld_ref) == 0 ) failed: Refcount is 1
[38113.121791] LustreError: 13233:0:(lu_object.c:1140:lu_device_fini()) LBUG
[38113.150755] Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG
[38113.177028] Pid: 13233, comm: umount Tainted: GF O 3.6.10-4.fc18.x86_64 #1
[38113.207329] Call Trace:
[38113.231847] [<ffffffff816198db>] panic+0xc1/0x1d0

[38113.287243] [<ffffffffa04117ca>] lu_device_fini+0xba/0xc0 [obdclass]

[38113.831700] -----------[ cut here ]-----------
[38113.864819] WARNING: at arch/x86/kernel/smp.c:123 native_smp_send_reschedule+0x5b/0x60()
[38113.901721] Hardware name: X8DTT
[38113.932625] Modules linked in: lustre(OF) obdecho(OF) mgc(OF) lov(OF) osc(OF) mdc(OF) lmv(OF) fid(OF) fld(OF) ptlrpc(OF) obdclass(OF) lvfs(OF) nfsv3 nfs_acl nfsv4 auth_rpcgss nfs lockd sunrpc dns_resolver fscache ksocklnd(OF) lnet(OF) sha512_generic libcfs(OF) ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_addr ib_sa mlx4_ib ib_mad ib_core mlx4_en igb coretemp kvm_intel iTCO_wdt kvm iTCO_vendor_support i7core_edac edac_core ioatdma ptp pps_core lpc_ich dca mlx4_core mfd_core i2c_i801 crc32c_intel serio_raw microcode mgag200 i2c_algo_bit drm_kms_helper ttm drm i2c_core [last unloaded: lvfs]

item.environment:
https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/1340/

Server: el6, x86_64
clients: fc18, x86_64

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: This is a duplicate of LU-1480.

Yu, Jian

Could you please look into this one?

Thanks

Peter
